title: botrychium crenulatum
intro: Botrychium crenulatum, also known as the narrow-leaved grape fern, is a type of rare and endangered plant species belonging to the family Osmundaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Botrychium crenulatum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically harvested and dried, then used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is often limited due to its rarity and endangered status.
